entry.title: Project 4
entry.content: Setup Docker with Windows Terminal and Oh My ZSH.
entry.summary: Setup Docker with Windows Terminal and Oh My ZSH.

entry.title: Project 1
entry.content: Build an embedded Linux image from scratch with Docker.
entry.summary: Build an embedded Linux image from scratch with Docker.

entry.title: Project 6
entry.content: A Django based project with token authentication expiration. Inspired by this StackOverflow answer.
entry.summary: A Django based project with token authentication expiration. Inspired by this StackOverflow answer.

entry.title: Project 5
entry.content: A Django based Book Library project. This project is a sample app that can be used for other projects.
entry.summary: A Django based Book Library project. This project is a sample app that can be used for other projects.

entry.title: Project 3
entry.content: This is a recipe RESTful API written with Django and Django REST framework based on Test-driven development built over Docker. This project is a sample app that can be used for other projects.
entry.summary: This is a recipe RESTful API written with Django and Django REST framework based on Test-driven development built over Docker. This project is a sample app that can be used for other projects.

entry.title: Project 2
entry.content: OVTS is an Open-source Vehicle Tracking System project based on GPS. It can track the device based on GPS data and send information to the main server (AKA Center). It can be mounted on a car or any other vehicles. The communication is over on GPRS and SMS. The device has other features like output relay, input voltage sensor, IMU sensor, etc.
entry.summary: OVTS is an Open-source Vehicle Tracking System project based on GPS. It can track the device based on GPS data and send information to the main server (AKA Center). It can be mounted on a car or any other vehicles. The communication is over on GPRS and SMS. The device has other features like output relay, input voltage sensor, IMU sensor, etc.
